goal.original: Investigate the history workspace masking system. Auto-detection masks disappear when masks are created in other entries. Check mask persistency and brief before coding.
goal.summary: Read-only investigation is complete. No code was changed. The next session should implement auto-mask session-temp persistence parity with manual masks, plus the small lifecycle guard that prevents mask-panel remount from clearing unchanged auto-mask settings.

completed: Confirmed manual/subtract masks persist only in Electron session temp via maskTempStore and main.js mask-temp IPC.
Confirmed auto-detected masks are currently component-local RAM state plus Comfy /view URLs, not project sidecar data and not temp-store data.
Identified likely lifecycle bug: MpiToolOptionsMask setup calls setAutoMaskModel/setAutoMaskUseBox, whose current implementations clear auto-pick state even when values did not change.
pending: Implement session-temp persistence parity for auto-detected masks without making masks durable project sidecar data.
Make auto-mask model/mode initialization non-destructive when values are unchanged.
Verify entry switching, prompt/canvas swaps, mask-panel remounts, and app-session behavior.

allowed_actions: update docs or rules only if explicitly approved by the user

completed: Captured investigation findings and next implementation scope in this handoff.
pending: If code is changed and component wiring or mask persistence behavior changes, ask the user whether .claude/rules/ should be updated, per CLAUDE.md documentation drift rule.
Do not expand scope to permanent project-sidecar mask persistence unless the user explicitly asks.

next_action.description: Read the listed files, then implement auto-detected mask persistence through the same session-temp mechanism used by manual masks, preserving the user's stated scope: auto masks should match manual masks for now, not become project-durable.

key_decisions: User does not want durable project-sidecar mask persistence yet.
Auto-detected masks should have the same persistence level as manual masks: session-temp persistence in Electron, cleared on app quit/stale-session cleanup.
A narrow lifecycle fix should prevent mask option panel initialization from clearing existing auto-mask picks when the model/mode value is unchanged.
constraints: No code was written in the investigation session.
Follow project rules before editing: use existing utilities, Events/state rules, ComponentFactory patterns, BEM, and clientLogger instead of bare console logging for new frontend logging.
Current manual mask temp store writes manual.png and subtract.png under a per project/group/item session-temp key.
Browser dev mode has no Electron IPC; mask temp persistence is disabled there by design.
Do not persist mask pixels into project.json or Media/.meta sidecars for this scope.

resume_prompt: Read .agents/mpi-kanban/state/handoffs/34e26cb3-f41f-4215-939c-fae0af421b1d.json and use $mpi-continue in Codex or /mpi-kanban:mpi-continue in Claude Code. You are implementing only session-temp persistence parity for auto-detected masks in the history workspace: auto masks should persist like manual masks within the same Electron session, not become project-durable sidecar data. Start by reading the rules and mask files listed in the handoff, then brief before coding.
